{{Quote|Brentaal Princess? That's pretty pretentious.|[[Nazrita Villache]]|<ref name="Platt's Smugglers Guide">''[[Platt's Smugglers Guide]]''</ref>}}
The '''''Brentaal Princess''''' was a [[Ghtroc Industries|Ghtroc]] [[720 light freighter/Legends|720 freighter]] that was owned by the [[Boztrok]] branch of the [[Klatooinian Trade Guild/Legends|Klatooinian Trade Guild]]. The ship had received numerous modifications from the Guild mechanic, [[Nazrita Villache]]. The ship was adorned with extra hull armor, the double [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] was given a power boost and the shields overhauled. On top of this, the ship was outfitted with a concealed [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] tube, capable of holding up to five torpedoes.

The ship was given to [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]] on hire/purchase, along with its [[WED Treadwell repair droid/Legends|WED Treadwell repair droid]], [[Bee-Zerobee]]. Okeefe named the ship after her homeworld of [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal IV]]. The [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] progressively got behind on her loan repayments, and the Guild leader, [[Pok Nar-Ten]], hired the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Zo'Tannath]] to capture Okeefe. Okeefe was flying the ''Brentaal Princess'' to [[Wroona/Legends|Wroona]] at the time. It is unknown what happened to the ship after Okeefe was captured. The smuggler was later sold into slavery.
